dashboard.label: kassi: change impact, read from Splunk
dashboard.description: Client-side k6 metrics joined to the target's server-side telemetry over the exact test window, plus the agent's own state-machine walk (one event per Burr phase, keyed by app_id). Each run is published to index=kassi_runs by kassi's report phase.

search.query: index=kassi_runs sourcetype=kassi:run | head 1 | eval kind=case(srv_5xx>0,"REGRESSION", k6_failed_pct>0,"DEGRADED", forecast_p95_ms>1.25*srv_p95_ms,"DEGRADING", true(),"HEALTHY") | fields kind

index=kassi_runs sourcetype=kassi:run | head 1 | eval "client p95"=k6_p95_ms." ms", "client failed"=k6_failed_pct."%", "server p95"=srv_p95_ms." ms", "server 5xx"=srv_5xx, "root cause"=coalesce(root_cause,"none"), "forecast p95"=forecast_p95_ms." ms (".forecaster.")" | rename worst_path AS endpoint | table endpoint "client p95" "client failed" "server p95" "server 5xx" "root cause" "forecast p95"

panel.title: the agent's walk — Burr state machine, latest run

search.query: index=kassi_runs sourcetype=kassi:step [search index=kassi_runs sourcetype=kassi:run | head 1 | return app_id] | sort seq | eval Card=card_num." ".card | rename phase AS Phase, status AS Outcome, tool_calls AS "Calls", tools AS "Tool calls" | table seq Card Phase Outcome "Calls" "Tool calls"
index=kassi_runs sourcetype=kassi:step | stats count BY status | sort - count

chart.title: client vs server p95 across runs (the join)

search.query: index=kassi_runs sourcetype=kassi:run | sort 0 _time | table _time k6_p95_ms srv_p95_ms
index=web sourcetype=access_json | stats count AS requests, sum(eval(if(status>=500,1,0))) AS errors, perc95(response_time) AS p95_ms BY path | eval p95_ms=round(p95_ms,1) | sort - errors

index=kassi_runs sourcetype=kassi:run | sort - _time | eval when=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | table when mode endpoints verdict k6_reqs k6_p95_ms k6_failed_pct srv_5xx root_cause forecaster forecast_p95_ms | head 25
